title: Board access list by user
excerpt:
Is there a way to list what boards Users/Teams have access to in the Monday Account. 
I may be missing a simple process but it is eluding me.  As the boards get bigger I want to have a clear view of what staff can access…

posts.author: Noelie2000 (Noel Pusey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to list what boards Users/Teams have access to in the Monday Account.

I may be missing a simple process but it is eluding me. As the boards get bigger I want to have a clear view of what staff can access, amend or view.

Many thanks for any guidance.
